title: DispDev Statement
parameters:
deviceID	The device ID for the desired display device.

21 RC+

24 TP (TP1 only)

The following parameters are also available.

21 DEVID_SELF

24 DEVID_TP

20 DEVID_TP3
see_also:
Sets the current display device.

DispDev Function

DispDev Statement Example

DispDev DEVID_TP
